Dialog.name: MSG_000_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 109 1 6 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 2 0 0}I don't have one myself though... How do you feel about yukatas, {f 4 1}-san?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_002_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 109 1 6 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 3 0 0}{f 5 13 9 15 109}That makes sense. A yukata would be perfect for the summer festival.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_003_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 109 0 6 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 4 0 0}{f 5 13 9 5 109}Really? I think a yukata would be more appropriate for the summer festival.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 109 4 6 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 5 0 0}{f 4 23 0 109 4 25 25}Oh, but... you were, um, giving me a compliment, weren't you...? Sorry. And, thank you.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_004_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 109 0 6 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 6 0 0}I'd like to get a yukata, but whenever I have money, I end up spending it on books.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_004_3_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 109 0 6 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 7 0 0}Which reminds me, I got a new manga recently.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 109 1 6 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 8 0 0}{f 4 23 0 109 1 25 25}It's really easy to get into, and the story makes you feel all warm inside.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_004_5_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 109 4 6 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 9 0 0}Oh... Sorry! We were talking about yukatas, weren't we?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_005_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 109 1 6 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 10 0 0}Mmm, something smells delicious... It must be takoyaki.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_005_5_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 109 0 6 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 11 0 0}Um, do you think we should order some?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 109 0 6 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 12 0 0}I don't think I can finish them by myself, so maybe we can split them?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_006_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 109 1 6 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 13 0 0}Excuse me. Can I get one order of takoyaki, please?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_008_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 15 0 0}...Here you go, one order of takoyaki![n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 16 0 0}Today, I'm using a special ingredient in place of the octopus![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_009_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 109 0 6 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 17 0 0}Takoyaki without octopus... I'm a little scared to try it.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 109 1 6 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 18 0 0}{f 4 23 0 109 1 25 25}But it smells so good... I guess we're about to find out what's inside.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_009_5_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 109 1 6 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 19 0 0}Here you go. They're hot, so be careful.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_010_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 109 0 6 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 22 0 0}{f 4 23 0 109 0 25 25}But I can't figure out what she put in them...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_011_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 109 1 6 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 24 0 0}That cat one is cute! I just want to pet it...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_011_3_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 109 1 6 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 25 0 0}Oh, a hyottoko mask! It looks so weird... Like an octopus![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_011_5_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 109 1 6 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 26 0 0}Now I feel like I'm really in the summer festival spirit.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_012_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 27 0 0}{f 5 21 0 11}Hey, you two! Wanna try your hand at a lucky draw?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 28 0 0}{f 5 21 0 11}Make some nice memories, whaddaya say? Odds are lookin' good—lots of winning tickets left![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_013_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 109 0 6 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 30 0 0}That could be fun. Shall we give it a try?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_014_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}The box is filled with[n]triangular lottery tickets...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_016_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 31 0 0}{f 5 21 0 11}Congratulations, you won![n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 32 0 0}{f 5 21 0 11}Wow, you must have incredible luck to win on your first try![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_017_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}DEV: (Item name) received.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_018_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 34 0 0}{f 5 21 0 11}Congratulations, you won![n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 35 0 0}{f 5 21 0 11}Wow, you must have incredible luck to win on your first try![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_019_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}DEV: (Item name) received.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_020_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 109 1 6 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 37 0 0}Wow, you actually got a prize![n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 109 1 6 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 38 0 0}This might be the first time I've seen someone win at a game like this.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_021_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 109 0 6 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 39 0 0}Oh, look at the time... It feels like it went by so fast.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 109 1 6 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 40 0 0}{f 4 23 0 109 1 25 25}Thank you for joining me today. I had so much fun.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_021_5_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 109 1 6 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 41 0 0}If any other events come up, um... maybe we could go together?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_022_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}After seeing Chihiro home,[n]I went back to the dorm.[n]{f 1 1}
